description: Phrase-dense passage loaded with phrasal verbs, idioms, and fixed expressions. Stress tests the phrases list. C1 student, range C1-C2. Polysemous and vocabulary lists are empty because all single words are below C1 range — the hard parts are the phrasal patterns, not the individual words. textFit is appropriate because the 90th percentile of content (including phrase-inflated levels) is C1 — the C2 idioms are top-10% outliers.
passage: When the project fell apart, the team had to go back to square one. The manager pointed out that they had been cutting corners for months, and it finally caught up with them. Rather than dwell on the failure, she encouraged everyone to come up with fresh ideas. One junior developer, who had been keeping a low profile, spoke up and put forward a bold plan. At first, the others were taken aback, but as they talked it through, the idea began to take shape. By the end of the week, they had turned things around and were back on track.
